config.title: Vampire Clone
config.content:
## Vampire Clone (this repo)

Browser **Phaser 3** survivor-style game. It does **not** ship telemetry to Elasticsearch by default.

### Play (GitHub Pages)

After [GitHub Actions Pages](https://github.com/poulsbopete/Vampire-Clone/actions) has deployed **`main`**, open:

**[Play on GitHub Pages →](https://poulsbopete.github.io/Vampire-Clone/)**

*(Other forks: use `https://<user>.github.io/<repo>/`.)*

### Run locally

```bash
npm install && npm run development
```

### After you add logs/metrics/traces

Point Lens panels at your data views or ES|QL `FROM logs-*` (and similar) once ingest is wired.

---
*Dashboard created with the Kibana dashboards API (`kibana-dashboards.js`).*
